prompt: First-time setup on a monorepo with React frontend + Express API + iOS native. Running /forge-setup. What platforms will be detected and what's the enforcement recommendation?
expected_output: Detects: web (package.json + React), api (Express routes), ios (xcodeproj). Recommends: standard enforcement (default). Creates .validationforge/config.json with platforms: [web, api, ios]. Scaffolds e2e-evidence/. Copies 8 rules. Verifies JSON valid. Prints: 'Platforms: web, api, ios | Enforcement: standard | Evidence: e2e-evidence/ | Rules: 8 installed | MCP: playwright (available), xcode (available)'.
